title: quetzalia schiedeana
intro: Quetzalia schiedeana, also known as Quetzalia, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of limonoids and alkaloids. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. Quetzalia schiedeana is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cases, it is used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations.
